archetype: Luxury Feminine & Pastel Soft (Customized for Premium PR)
global_aesthetic: Expensive, global, fashion-oriented, high-status, brand-safe. Soft luxury with Vogue-inspired spacing. No cheap pinks, no childish influencer aesthetics.

descriptions.kick-neon: Elegant Subtle Neon Green (#98FF98) - use for glow/accents only, avoid gamer-cheap look.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

typography.notes: Headings MUST be Cormorant Garamond. Keep weights Light or Regular for an editorial look. Never use Inter or Roboto.

spacing_scale.philosophy: Generous spacing. Allow elements to breathe. Think Vogue magazine layouts. Elements should not feel crammed.

motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveals: Use framer-motion. Initial opacity 0, y: 40. Smooth spring transition on whileInView.

header.style: Fixed, Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20)
header.components: Brand Text Logo (YAREN ALACA), Navigation Links, EN | TR elegant language toggle (opacity-50 for inactive, font-semibold for active), Primary CTA.

sections.name: 1. Premium Hero
sections.design: Cinematic portrait as background. Gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#FCFAF8] via-transparent to-black/20) to ensure header visibility. Text is minimal, bottom-left aligned, huge Cormorant Garamond typography. Floating scroll indicator.

sections.name: 2. Digital Platform Power (Dijital Platform Gücü)
sections.layout: Bento-style CSS Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-8.
sections.design: 4 premium interactive cards. IG (Blush gradient), TikTok (Soft pearl), YouTube (Champagne), Kick (Dark frosted glass with subtle neon green edge/glow). Include platform logos, animated counter stats, and 'Visit' CTAs.

sections.name: 3. Cross-Platform Digital Impact
sections.layout: Luxury editorial section. Two-column asymmetric (text-heavy left, aesthetic image right).
sections.design: Large animated numerals (7M+, Hundreds of Millions). Minimalist dividers. Very soft peach backgrounds.

sections.name: 4. Content Categories
sections.layout: Masonry or 4x2 grid of luxury category blocks.
sections.design: Categories: Beauty, Fashion, Lifestyle, Entertainment, Travel, Live Streaming, Youth Culture, Viral Trends. Use background images with heavy hover-zoom effect and dark elegant overlays.

sections.name: 5. Multi-Platform Campaign System
sections.design: Alternating text/image layout. Explain Reels, TikTok, YouTube integrations. Use the skincare/luxury abstract textures here.

sections.name: 6. Premium Horizontal Sliders
sections.design: Showcase platform highlights and brand collaboration logos/moments. High-end social proof.

sections.name: 7. Final CTA / Lead Capture
sections.layout: Centered luxury card layout within a padded section.
sections.design: Glassmorphism form container. 'Start Collaboration' & 'Request Media Kit' tabs. Elegant input fields (Shadcn customized with soft borders). Email link.

image_urls.description: Abstract luxury soft liquid gradient background in champagne beige (Use behind text or as section wrapper if personal photo isn't spanning 100%). *Note: Main Agent must implement a prop/slot for user's personal uploaded photo for the Hero.*
Close up macro shot of soft peach glossy liquid cosmetic texture
High-end Los Angeles lifestyle aesthetic, soft sunset pastel sky
Elegant minimalist fashion studio setup with soft sheer fabric draped
Subtle glowing neon green light bleeding through frosted glass. Use as background for the Kick platform card.
Stock luxury portrait to be used as a stand-in for Yaren's uploaded personal photos (Hero section).

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts are imported properly (Cormorant Garamond and Outfit). Do NOT use Inter.
The UI is primarily Light mode, emphasizing Ivory, Champagne, and Blush.

For the Kick platform card, break the light mode rule slightly by using a frosted dark slate/black glass with a subtle neon green border/glow. It MUST remain elegant and not feel like a cheap gaming site.
Spacing is critical. Use py-24 or py-32 for section padding to achieve the 'Vogue-inspired' luxury feel.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card component for the aesthetic marketing sections as it is too rigid. Use raw Tailwind divs. You can use Shadcn for the CTA Lead Capture form.
Ensure the EN | TR toggle actually exists in the header (even if functional logic is mocked).
Use framer-motion for elegant, slow, upward-fading reveals on scroll.
Do not use generic blue or standard SaaS colors anywhere.
